evals.expected_output: CLAUDE.md updated with Role + Owner sections (English labels); data-report-specialist.md, planning-specialist.md, meeting-specialist.md created in .claude/agents/; memory/MEMORY.md seeded; onboarding.json set to status: active

assertions.text: CLAUDE.md ## Role section is populated (not just a placeholder comment)
CLAUDE.md has a ## Owner section appended
Owner section uses mapped label 'English' (not raw value 'en')
Exactly 3 domain agents created: data-report-specialist, meeting-specialist, planning-specialist
writing-specialist and documentation-specialist are NOT created (conditions not met)
memory/MEMORY.md exists and contains owner preferences and workflow context
onboarding.json status is 'active' and appliedAt field is present

evals.prompt: プロフィールを反映して
evals.expected_output: CLAUDE.md updated with Japanese Owner labels (言語: 日本語); writing-specialist.md and planning-specialist.md created; neverDo/alwaysFollow lines present; onboarding.json set to status: active

assertions.text: CLAUDE.md ## Role section is populated (not just a placeholder comment)
Owner section uses '日本語' (not raw 'ja') for Language
Owner section includes '**Never do**: 箇条書きを使わない' line
Owner section includes '**Always follow**: 敬語を使う' line
Exactly 2 domain agents created: writing-specialist, planning-specialist
writing-specialist.md output standards section contains the neverDo and alwaysFollow values from profile
onboarding.json status is 'active' and appliedAt field is present

evals.expected_output: Skill stops immediately with error message about incomplete profile. No changes to CLAUDE.md. No agent files created. onboarding.json unchanged.

assertions.text: Response contains an error message about incomplete profile / onboarding not done
CLAUDE.md is NOT modified (no ## Owner section added, Role still placeholder)
